description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the default runner image and prepares a Lua 5.2 development environment in a global before_script by updating apt, installing unzip, lua5.2 and lua5.2-dev, downloading luarocks‑2.2.2, extracting it, running ./configure; make bootstrap, and then installing the busted and luacov rocks. Define a single job named test in the default test stage. The test job runs the script commands: busted, then captures the last line of luacov.report.out into a variable, and echoes the coverage report. It uploads luacov.report.out as an artifact so the coverage file is retained after the job.
